#what this project is?

 It is a type of ai agent which helps you to write and debug your code.
 
 The user gives a prolem and it starts building a systematic pipeline to to create a real life project for your problem.

 It starts building your project by writing code in chunks and lets you check if you want any modification. It works in a step by step process and also gives suggestions for improvements.

 #tools used

 1.Python
 2.uv
 3.Node.js
 4.
